summary.work_completed: Fixed bug in Notification.tsx identified by frontend-review-agent (handoff 022). Replaced fragile startsWith-based error detection with robust includes('error') check. Added 8 unit tests in Notification.test.tsx. PR #37 opened on branch bugfix/36-notification-error-detection.
key_findings: Bug: 'Import error: ...' messages did not start with 'error' — relied on brittle second condition
Fix: single includes('error') check handles all current and future error message formats
Added Notification.test.tsx with 8 tests covering T-FE-PERS-001-04 and T-FE-SHARE-001-03
All existing 15 unit tests remain unaffected by this change
PR #37 is ready for frontend-review-agent review

recommended_actions: Verify Notification.tsx now uses includes('error') instead of startsWith
Verify Notification.test.tsx covers 'Error: Storage limit exceeded.' case (T-FE-PERS-001-04)
Check accessibility: role=status and aria-live=polite still present
